jobs.title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Expert For DTC Beauty Brand
jobs.description:
Email Marketing Specialist Needed for Fast-Growing DTC Beauty Brand

We’re a growing direct-to-consumer beauty brand looking for an experienced Email Marketing Specialist to help us scale retention, increase repeat purchases, and improve customer LTV through strategic email campaigns and flows.

What We Need
We’re looking for someone who understands both the creative and analytical side of email marketing for eCommerce brands — especially in beauty, skincare, cosmetics, wellness, or lifestyle.

You should be comfortable owning the full lifecycle of email marketing: Strategy, Copywriting, Campaign planning, Flow optimization, Segmentation, A/B testing, Reporting & optimization.

Responsibilities: Create and manage weekly email campaigns. Build and optimize automated flows: Welcome flow, Abandoned cart, Browse abandonment, Post-purchase, Winback, VIP / loyalty. Write high-converting email copy aligned with brand voice. Coordinate visuals/design direction. Segment audiences for better targeting. Analyze performance metrics and improve deliverability, CTR, and conversion. Recommend retention strategies based on customer behavior.

Requirements: Proven experience with DTC/eCommerce brands. Strong understanding of Klaviyo preferred. Experience in beauty/skincare brands is a strong plus. Strong copywriting and retention marketing skills. Ability to interpret data and make optimization decisions. Familiarity with Shopify ecosystem.

Nice to Have: SMS marketing experience. UGC/creative strategy understanding. Experience scaling brands from 6 to 7+ figures.

To Apply: Please include examples/case studies of brands you’ve worked with, results achieved including revenue/open rates/CTR, favorite beauty/skincare brand email campaign and why, and monthly retainer or hourly rate. Looking for someone long-term who can become a key part of our growth team.

Less than 30 hrs/week. Hourly. Less than 1 month duration. Intermediate. One-time project. Proposals: 10 to 15. Client last viewed 8 seconds ago. Interviewing: 0. Invites sent: 5. Unanswered invites: 5.
